news.headline: Swiss National Bank lowers rates by 0.5%, Euro strengthens ahead of ECB meeting. December 12 market news.
news.summary: The Swiss National Bank unexpectedly reduced its interest rate by 0.5%, causing the euro to slightly rise in anticipation of the European Central Bank's upcoming decision. This decision came on 12/12 and was reported by Bloomberg.

news.headline: Bamboo Rose hits milestone: $2 trillion retail revenue managed, doubling from last year; signifies remarkable growth in 2024.
news.summary: In Boston on December 12, 2024, Bamboo Rose, a prominent player in retail product development and supply chain technology worldwide, has reached a significant achievement. The retail revenue under its management has crossed the $2 trillion mark, showing a remarkable doubling from the previous year. This extraordinary growth in revenue highlights...

news.headline: Greenwave wins $2M government contract for recycling 550,000 pounds of metal, projected to boost revenues by $2M in Q4 2024-Q1 2025.
news.summary: Greenwave is set to recycle a significant 550,000 pounds of non-ferrous metal, a move that is projected to boost revenues in the fourth quarter of 2024 and the first quarter of 2025 by around $2 million. Through strategic partnerships with municipal, state, and federal entities, Greenwave solidifies its position as a frontrunner in the metal recycling industry. This initiative showcases the company's commitment to sustainability and its ability to capitalize on lucrative recycling opportunities in CHESAPEAKE, Va. The projected outcomes highlight the company's strong financial prospects and its dedication to environmental responsibility.

news.headline: Central bank reduces rates by 0.25% to 3%, meeting expectation.
Aditxt's subsidiary Adimune completes preclinical studies for ADI-100. Progress towards first clinical trials. (Word count: 17)
news.summary: A company based in Mountain View, California, Aditxt, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADTX) has shared that its subsidiary, Adimune, Inc., has finished all preclinical efficacy and safety evaluations for ADI-100, an antigen-specific gene therapy. This marks a significant advancement for Adimune as they get ready to file a Clinical Trial Application (CTA)/Investigational New Drug application. The completion of these studies is crucial for the development and approval process of ADI-100, showcasing progress in the company's endeavors within the health innovation sector.

news.headline: 1NCE introduces program to help software integrators simplify IoT solutions with cloud network.
news.summary: 1NCE, a leading global IoT network operator based in Cologne, Germany, and Miami, has recently announced the launch of a certification program for software integrators. This program aims to facilitate IoT innovation by providing streamlined processes for integrating software. This move comes as 1NCE continues to maintain its position as the operator of the largest IoT network in the cloud. By introducing this program, 1NCE demonstrates its commitment to fostering collaboration within the IoT industry.

news.headline: Traders keep ECB rate bets steady; see 127 bps of cuts in 2025.
ECB drops reference to 'restrictive’ from the statement.

ECB: The ECB’s interest rate decisions will be based on its assessment of the inflation outlook in light of incoming economic and financial data, dynamics of underlying inflation, and the strength of monetary policy transmission.
Interim HealthCare awards Josh Heuker and Melissa Warner as 2024 Therapist and Paraprofessional of the Year.
news.summary: Two healthcare professionals, Josh Heuker from Lima, Ohio, and Melissa Warner from Greenville, South Carolina, have been recognized by Interim HealthCare in SUNRISE, Florida for their outstanding patient care. This award highlights their dedication and commitment to providing exceptional healthcare services.

news.headline: ECB: Accordingly, interest rates on deposit facility, main refinancing operations and marginal lending facility will be decreased to 3.00%, 3.15% and 3.40% respectively, with effect from 18 December 2024.
ECB: APP and PEPP portfolio is declining at a measured and predictable pace, as the eurosystem no longer reinvests principal payments from maturing securities.
ECB: The ECB is not pre-committing to a particular rate path.
ECB: Over time, gradually fading effects of restrictive monetary policy should support a pick-up in domestic demand.
ECB: Most measures of underlying inflation suggest that inflation will settle at around the governing council's 2% medium-term target on a sustained basis.
Atossa Therapeutics to present findings of compounds boosting (Z)-endoxifen's efficacy for breast cancer treatment at conference.
news.summary: A recent study utilized insilico and chemical screening techniques to identify compounds that act synergistically with (Z)-endoxifen in inducing cell death in MCF-7 breast cancer cells. The findings suggest the potential for combination therapies in treating breast cancer. This research could lead to the development of more effective treatment strategies. The study's results highlight the importance of leveraging computational and experimental methods in drug discovery. The collaborative approach resulted in the identification of specific compounds that enhance the anticancer effects of (Z)-endoxifen. This study provides promising insights for future breast cancer treatment options and highlights the significance of synergistic drug interactions. Such innovative research endeavors hold promise for advancing cancer therapies and improving patient outcomes.

news.headline: Orgain and Ali Fedotowsky-Manno collaborate on holiday treats; consumers can submit recipes for a chance to win year's supply of Orgain Nut Butter Protein Powder and cookware.
news.summary: Orgain is spreading holiday cheer by inviting people across the country to submit their favorite holiday recipes for a chance to win a year's worth of Orgain Nut Butter Protein Powder, influenced by JUSTIN'S® nut butters, and high-quality cookware. The contest offers consumers the opportunity to upgrade their favorite recipes with better nutrition. This generosity embodies the festive spirit and gives individuals the chance to win prizes that include a year's supply of protein powder and premium cookware. The initiative encourages people to join in the holiday fun and share their most beloved recipes to win exciting rewards.

news.headline: Axtria named leader in Frost & Sullivan's inaugural Pharmaceutical Commercialization Solutions and Services Industry Radar Report.
news.summary: In Berkeley Heights, New Jersey on December 12, 2024, Axtria Inc., a worldwide provider of cloud software and data analytics for the life sciences sector, has achieved top ranking in Frost & Sullivan's first-ever Pharmaceutical Commercialization Solutions and Services. This acknowledgment solidifies Axtria Inc.'s reputation as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: Immutep announces positive data for head and neck cancer trial at ESMO Immuno-Oncology 2024. Study evaluates eftilagimod alpha in combination with KEYTRUDA for 1st line HNSCC patients.
news.summary: In Sydney, Australia, on December 12, 2024, Immutep Limited (ASX: IMM; NASDAQ: IMMP), a biotechnology company, has shared positive results from Cohort B of the TACTI-003 (KEYNOTE-C34) Phase IIb trial. The trial focuses on assessing eftilagimod alpha (efti) alongside MSD’s anti-PD-1 therapy KEYTRUDA® (pembrolizumab) for first line recurrent/metastatic head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (1L HNSCC) patients with negative PD-L1 expression. This clinical study explores novel LAG-3 immunotherapies for cancer and autoimmune disease.

news.headline: Horizon Copper grants 1,240,000 Restricted Share Rights to officers, directors, employees, and consultants.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 12, 2024, Horizon Copper Corp. revealed that they have awarded a total of 1,240,000 Restricted Share Rights (RSRs) to specific officers, directors, employees, and consultants. Horizon Copper is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol HCU and on the OTCQX as HNCUF.

news.headline: Rhode Island Life Science Hub selects Mark A. Turco, MD, as first President and CEO. Turco has 25+ years of experience.
news.summary: In Providence, Rhode Island, on December 12, 2024, the Rhode Island Life Science Hub's Board of Directors appointed Mark A. Turco, MD, as the organization's inaugural President and CEO. With over 25 years of experience, Dr. Turco has been chosen to lead the organization in its mission.

news.headline: 90% of Gen Z and Millennials impulse buy on social media; 1 in 5 on unexpected platforms. GoDaddy survey.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by GoDaddy revealed a significant generational gap in consumer shopping habits on social media platforms. The data, gathered from 1,500 individuals in the U.S., indicates that over 20% of consumers are actively making purchases on social media. Surprisingly, the platforms being utilized for shopping differ from what is commonly assumed. The study, conducted in Tempe, Arizona, also highlighted the growing trend of online shopping through social media channels.

news.headline: StreamUnlimited and Fraunhofer IIS to showcase upHear Flexible Rendering at CES 2025 for immersive sound with as few as three speakers.
news.summary: A collaboration between StreamUnlimited Engineering and Fraunhofer IIS was announced in Vienna on December 12, 2024. The partnership aims to showcase the innovative upHear Flexible Rendering technology at CES 2025. This cutting-edge technology promises enhanced sound quality and enables users to enjoy immersive audio with just three speakers.

news.headline: ECB: Staff now expect a slower economic recovery than in September projections.
ECB: Staff see headline inflation averaging 2.4% in 2024, 2.1% in 2025, 1.9% in 2026 and 2.1% in 2027 when the expanded EU emissions trading system becomes operational.
ECB: They continue to be tight because monetary policy remains restrictive and past interest rate hikes are still transmitting to outstanding stock of credit.
ECB: Eurosystem no longer reinvests all of principal payments from maturing securities purchased under PEPP, reducing PEPP portfolio by €7.5 billion per month on average.
ECB Interest Rate Actual 3.15% (Forecast 3.15%, Previous 3.40%)
ECB Deposit Rate Actual 3% (Forecast 3%, Previous 3.25%)
ECB: Domestic inflation has edged down but remains high, mostly because wages and prices in certain sectors are still adjusting to past inflation surge with a substantial delay.
ECB: Financing conditions are easing, as ECB’s recent interest rate cuts gradually make new borrowing less expensive for firms and households.
ECB: For inflation excluding energy and food, staff project an average of 2.9% in 2024, 2.3% in 2025 and 1.9% in both 2026 and 2027.

Mass spectrometry market is forecasted to reach ~$15-16 billion by 2035, growing at 8% CAGR, driven by demand in healthcare, environmental safety, and biotechnology sectors. Market dominated by instruments (~75% share) with demand for advanced tools. In-depth insights into applications, technologies, manufacturing purposes, and product segments shared.
news.summary: The article discusses the importance of mass spectrometry in various industries and its diverse applications such as proteomics, drug detection, forensic science, environmental analysis, and pharmaceuticals. The global mass spectrometry market, estimated at around USD 7 billion in 2023, is expected to reach USD 15-16 billion by 2035, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 8%. The growth is driven by increasing R&D investment in pharmaceutical and biotechnology sectors, regulatory requirements for food safety and environmental monitoring, as well as technological advancements. The market is dominated by instruments (~75% market share) that offer high sensitivity and specificity for molecule identification and quantification. The market is segmented based on product type, manufacturing purposes, technology, products manufactured, and application areas, with key players such as GC-MS, MALDI TOF-MS, LC-MS, Quadruple MS, ESI-MS, Ion Trap MS, FT-MS, and TOF-MS leading the industry. Proteomics holds the largest market share (~45%) while metabolomics is the fastest-growing segment with a CAGR of 12%.

news.headline: SupplyHouse.com relocates fulfillment center from Cranbury to Dayton, NJ, aiming to expand operations.
news.summary: In Melville, New York, on December 12, 2024, SupplyHouse.com, a prominent online provider of plumbing, HVAC, and electrical supplies, shared news about the relocation of a fulfillment center from Cranbury, New Jersey, to Dayton, New Jersey. The move to the new fulfillment center signals a significant development in the company's operations.

news.headline: Subsea7 gets major contract offshore Saudi Arabia from Aramco, under long-term deal.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, Subsea 7 S.A. revealed that it had secured a significant contract from Aramco as part of a long-term agreement. Subsea 7 S.A., listed on Oslo Børs with the tickers SUBC and SUBCY in ADR, was awarded the contract, indicating a substantial deal with Aramco.

news.headline: Key travel trends in 2024: Record hurricane & holiday travel, increased anxiety, frequent delays, updated DOT regulations.
news.summary: In 2024, St. Petersburg, Florida witnessed an eventful travel year. The period saw unprecedented numbers of hurricanes and holiday travelers, leading to heightened traveler stress levels. Travel delays were frequent, compounded by the implementation of updated Department of Transportation (DOT) travel rules.

news.headline: California has cut 22% of emissions since 2006, GDP grew by 38%. Emissions cuts accelerated in recent years. Next 10 report shows progress towards 2030 climate targets.
news.summary: In San Francisco, California, it has been reported that the state has successfully reduced over 22% of its greenhouse gas emissions following the enactment of its significant climate legislation in 2006. However, during this time frame, California has also seen a noteworthy upsurge of 38% in its gross domestic product per capita. Latest figures from the 16th California Green Innovation Index by think tank Next 10 demonstrate a quicker progression in emission reductions in recent times, primarily due to significant decreases in crucial sectors. These reductions have brought California closer to attaining its 2030 climate objectives. The state's efforts in combatting climate change are evident, showcasing its commitment to sustainable practices and environmental responsibility.

news.headline: Calcasieu Parish DA's office to use NICE Justice for digital evidence management, first in LA, AI-powered platform.
news.summary: In Hoboken, New Jersey, NICE disclosed that the Calcasieu Parish District Attorney's Office is set to implement NICE Justice, an AI-powered tool within NICE’s Evidencentral platform, to enhance digital evidence management. This marks the initial adoption of NICE Justice by a District Attorney’s office in Louisiana. The cloud-based NICE Justice solution aims to modernize the process of handling digital evidence, offering a more efficient and secure approach. NICE is listed on the Nasdaq as NICE.

news.headline: Comedian Heather McMahan partners with Royal Canin for AKC National Championship viewer's choice awards at dog show.
news.summary: St. CHARLES, Mo. - On December 12, 2024, comedian partners with a top pet health nutrition brand to coincide with North America's biggest dog show, honoring the Best in Show and the best qualities in people. Royal Canin, recognized as a major player in pet health nutrition and part of the billion-dollar Mars brand, joins forces for this occasion.

news.headline: J.S. Held's Ocean Tomo subsidiary has 6 experts in the World's 300 Leading IP Strategists list - IAM. Celebrating 50 years.
news.summary: JERICHO, N.Y. - A global consulting firm, J.S. Held, marking 50 years of success, has partnered with subsidiary Ocean Tomo to highlight the achievement of six intellectual property (IP) specialists recognized among the World's 300 Leading IP Strategists by IAM. This announcement comes amid celebrations and acknowledgment of continued excellence in the field as they look forward to the future.

news.headline: Michael Tessler joins Glia's board of directors to boost growth strategy. NEW YORK, Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: A major player in the industry is ramping up its business expansion plan. Glia, a top company in customer interaction technology, revealed today that Michael Tessler, a prominent figure in the contact center sector, has become a part of its board of directors. This move aims to provide support and direction for Glia's growth strategy. The announcement comes out of New York on December 12, 2024.

news.headline: IonQ's quantum technology featured at NYSE - a milestone for the company. (Characters: 73)
news.summary: IonQ, a prominent player in the quantum computing sector, proudly reveals the exhibition of its ion trap at the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE). The ion trap serves as the cornerstone of IonQ's quantum computers and symbolizes their pioneering role in the quantum industry. IonQ is highlighted as the sole quantum computing entity featured at the NYSE, underscoring its technological leadership. This display signifies IonQ's expertise and innovation, showcasing their quantum advancements to a global audience. The event emphasizes IonQ's position as a frontrunner, solidifying its presence in the market.

news.headline: Data Vault Holdings, Inc. partners with CompuSystems to embed ADIO in M3 Expo Wallet app for live events.
news.summary: A company in New York known as Data Vault Holdings, Inc. has finalized a deal to sell its Datavault® and ADIO® IP and IT assets to WiSA Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: WISA). Data Vault Holdings, Inc. specializes in data visualization, valuation, and monetization. They have recently collaborated with CompuSystems, Inc. (CSI), a reputable firm offering registration, data analytics, and lead management services for live events. Through this partnership, ADIO will be integrated into CSI’s M3 Expo Wallet app. This move aims to enhance the services provided by both companies.

news.headline: Anumana partners with American College of Cardiology to enhance AI solutions for heart failure, focusing on detection and treatment.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, Anumana has partnered with the American College of Cardiology's Innovation Program to enhance the identification and management of cardiovascular disease. This collaboration aims to expedite the detection and treatment of heart-related conditions, ultimately benefiting individuals at risk. This initiative signifies a significant step towards advancing cardiac health, demonstrating Anumana's commitment to improving cardiovascular care alongside a reputable institution in the field.

news.headline: Safe Pro AI introduces SpotlightAI ONSITE for real-time drone imagery processing, aimed at mine detection; part of their AI solutions (Nasdaq: SPAI).
news.summary: Safe Pro Group Inc. (Nasdaq: SPAI), based in Aventura, Florida, has unveiled its latest innovation through its subsidiary Safe Pro AI. The company, known for its expertise in artificial intelligence solutions focusing on drone image processing, introduced the new software known as SpotlightAI™ ONSITE. This real-time automatic mine detection software is compatible with various drones and operates on Microsoft Windows. The AI-powered software is designed to analyze drone imagery swiftly and effectively. This cutting-edge technology signifies a significant advancement in the field of drone-based mine detection.

news.headline: dSPACE showcases how combining SIL and HIL test methods at CES 2025 accelerates automotive software development.
news.summary: A recent announcement from Wixom, Michigan and Las Vegas highlighted the integration of SIL and HIL test methodologies at CES. This innovation aims to validate safety-critical driving functions at earlier stages, ultimately resulting in expedited development cycles. This advancement underscores the importance of efficient testing processes in the automotive industry, emphasizing the need for speedy validation.GLenumbers.

news.headline: Curator Hotel & Resort Collection adds Chic Atlantic Beach Resort to its portfolio, further growing its offerings.
news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland, the Curator Hotel & Resort Collection has announced the addition of the stylish Atlantic Beach Resort to its expanding portfolio. This latest inclusion further enhances the collection, which now boasts a total of [number] exquisite properties.

news.headline: aiMotive and Sony Semiconductor Solutions team up to transform AD simulations in Budapest on Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in Budapest, Hungary, aiMotive, a prominent company specializing in simulation and AI products for automated driving, partnered with Sony Semiconductor Solutions Corporation. Sony is known for its advancements in semiconductors and imaging technologies. The collaboration between the two companies signifies a significant step forward in the development of automated driving technology.

news.headline: DNSFilter boosts channel revenue by 40% in 2024 and expands global partner network through major initiatives.
news.summary: In 2024, DNSFilter unveiled extensive plans to boost its worldwide channel partner network, ultimately raising channel-driven Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) by a notable 40%. This strategic move emphasizes the company's commitment to fostering channel partner growth.

news.headline: Elemental Impact invests in HTS tech leader MetOx to accelerate advancement; significant move for clean energy in U.S.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, MetOx International, Inc. (MetOx), a prominent U.S. company specializing in high-temperature superconducting (HTS) technology, revealed a notable investment from Elemental Impact, a top climate-focused investment platform. This investment aims to support the growth of MetOx's innovative technologies in the field.
